name: Side Jackknife
instructions: Lie on your side on a mat with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Place your lower arm on the mat for support or rest your head on it. Place your upper hand behind your head with your elbow pointing toward the ceiling. This is the starting position.
Simultaneously raise your upper leg and bring your upper elbow down toward it, contracting your obliques. Breathe out as you crunch.
Pause briefly at the top of the movement when your elbow and knee are as close together as possible.
Slowly lower both your leg and elbow back to the starting position while breathing in.
Complete all repetitions on one side before switching to the other side.
